testcase.name: testIncreaseQtyUpdatesRowTotal

failure.message: Row total must equal unitPrice × qty. 5525.0 × 2 = 11050.0 but got 1105.0 expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Row total must equal unitPrice × qty. 5525.0 × 2 = 11050.0 but got 1105.0 expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) testcase.name: testSubtotalEqualsRowTotalsSum

testcase.name: testTaxIsEighteenPercent

failure.message: Tax must be ~18% of subtotal. subtotal=5525.0 expected=995.0 got=10.0 expected [995.0] but found [10.0]

testcase.name: testTotalEqualsSubtotalPlusShippingPlusTax
